heading: Utilities and services: sale; expansion and extension of systems and facilities
label: 2686 Utilities and services: sale; expansion and extension of systems and facilities
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2481(a)5:626s.5:626s–1 (less words between semicolon and colon).10:1269., ; , .July 30, 1947, ch. 39461 Stat. 675Aug. 8, 1949, ch. 403, § 563 Stat. 57610:1269a (less words between semicolon and colon).34:553a.34:553b (less words between semicolon and colon).2481(b)5:626s–1 (words between semicolon and colon).10:1269a (words between semicolon and colon).34:553b (words between semicolon and colon).2481(c)5:626s–2.10:1269b.34:553c.In subsection (a), the words “within his establishment”, “of time”, and the opening clauses of 5:626s–1, 10:1269a, and 34:553b, are omitted as surplusage. The words “not available from another local source” are substituted for the words “not otherwise available from local private or public sources”.In subsection (b), the words “of sales under subsection (a)” are substituted for the words “received for any such utilities and related services sold pursuant to the authority of said sections”. The words “or appropriations” are omitted as surplusage.

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2686, added , , ; amended , , ; , , ; , , , related to military family housing leases, prior to repeal by , §§ 7(1), 12(a), , , 176, effective , and applicable to military construction projects, and to construction and acquisition of military family housing authorized before, on, or after such date. Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of authorities, functions, personnel, and assets of the Coast Guard, including the authorities and functions of the Secretary of Transportation relating thereto, to the Department of Homeland Security, and for treatment of related references, see sections 468(b), 551(d), 552(d), and 557 of Title 6, Domestic Security, and the Department of Homeland Security Reorganization Plan of , as modified, set out as a note under .November 25, 2002section 542 of Title 6

children.label: b
children.text: Proceeds of sales under subsection (a) shall be credited to the appropriation currently available for the supply of that utility or service.

children.label: c
children.text: To meet local needs the Secretary concerned may make minor expansions and extensions of any distributing system or facility within an activity through which a utility or service is furnished under subsection (a).
